title: Blueprint Swarm - Won/Lost Synthesis
description: Cross-deal analysis of win and loss factors, champion profiles, and competitive dynamics

factor.description: Key factor that contributed to winning deals (e.g., 'Strong executive sponsor aligned on ROI', 'Multi-threaded across 3+ stakeholders')

frequency.description: Number of won deals where this factor was present

pct_of_wins.description: Percentage of won deals where this factor was present

example_quotes.description: Verbatim quotes from calls that illustrate this win factor

affected_segments.description: Segments, verticals, or deal sizes where this factor was most prevalent (e.g., 'Enterprise', 'Healthcare', '$100K+ deals')

win_factors.description: Factors that consistently appear in won deals, ranked by frequency

factor.description: Key factor that contributed to losing deals

frequency.description: Number of lost deals where this factor was present

pct_of_losses.description: Percentage of lost deals where this factor was present

example_quotes.description: Verbatim quotes from calls that illustrate this loss factor

affected_segments.description: Segments, verticals, or deal sizes where this factor was most prevalent

loss_factors.description: Factors that consistently appear in lost deals, ranked by frequency

profile.description: Champion profile label (e.g., 'Technical Evaluator with Budget Influence')

frequency.description: Number of won deals with this champion type

characteristics.description: Observable behaviors and traits of this champion type

winning_types.description: Champion profiles that correlate with won deals

profile.description: Champion profile label (e.g., 'Enthusiastic User Without Authority')

frequency.description: Number of lost deals with this champion type

characteristics.description: Observable behaviors and traits of this champion type

losing_types.description: Champion profiles that correlate with lost deals

champion_profiles.description: Analysis of champion types and their correlation with deal outcomes

competitive_dynamics.description: Narrative summary of how competitive dynamics influenced win/loss patterns — which competitors appear in wins vs. losses, displacement patterns, and positioning effectiveness
